# DistaUSA
type = ecommerce marketplace
description = DistaUSA is an online marketplace offering authentic international brands across vitamins & supplements, makeup, skin & hair care, sunglasses, sports, pet care, bags, and more. The platform helps shoppers discover global products, compare options, and order online with reliable doorstep delivery to India.

## DistaUSA Audience
Primary = shoppers in India looking for international products
secondary = global online shoppers

## Shop by Category at DistaUSA
- Vitamins & Supplements
- Makeup
- Skin & Hair Care
- Sunglasses
- Sports
- Pet Care
- Bags
- Best Bargains
- Personal Care
- Lifestyle

## Why Customers Choose DistaUSA
- 10,000+ customers have shopped on the platform
- Transparent pricing with no hidden charges
- No KYC requirement
- Cash on Delivery (COD) available
- 4.6/5 customer rating on Trustpilot

## DistaUSA Customer shopping_experience
- Authentic international brands
- Easy online ordering
- Secure checkout
- Reliable doorstep delivery
